privileged_info_summary: The task operates on OSCAR EMR, a real open-source Canadian electronic medical records system. The metadata references two verified OHIP (Ontario Health Insurance Plan) medical billing codes: K013 (Individual Counselling, a time-based mental health service code) and A007 (Intermediate Assessment, a standard assessment code). The provider number 999998 follows the 6-digit OHIP format but is a synthetic test number. All data is synthetically generated by the task setup script via SQL insertion, including test patient records, billing records, and synthetic provider assignments. The report is expected in /home/ga/Documents/ directory with filename K013_Report in PDF, CSV, or TXT format.
